# Daily Report — 2026-06-17

## Task Completed
Added `get_change_task` tool to `change_tools.py`. The tool retrieves a single `change_task` record by its sys_id (32-char hex passthrough) or CTASK number (e.g. CTASK0001234, resolved via a secondary GET). Returns 16 normalised fields including state/priority/assigned_to/assignment_group/change_request as display values, planned dates, and audit timestamps. Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (change_coordinator and full packages). 19 new tests cover the happy paths, number resolution, 404/empty-result guards, network errors, and parameter validation.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1675
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-package advisories (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3 PYSEC-2026-141/142, wheel CVE-2026-24049). No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `CHANGE_TASK_FIELDS`, `GetChangeTaskParams`, `_format_change_task`, `_resolve_change_task_sys_id`, `get_change_task`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — added import and `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — added `GetChangeTaskParams` import, `get_change_task` import, registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to change_coordinator and full packages
- `tests/test_get_change_task.py` — 19 new tests (new file)

## Next Up
Add `update_change_task` tool (PATCH change_task; state/assigned_to/work_notes)
